assertions.title: Settings page fields

steps.expected: Business Name, Average Job Value, Butter AI Monthly Cost visible
steps.observed: All three fields present on page

assertions.notes: Settings page displays all three required fields: Business Name, Average Job Value (with $ indicator), and Butter AI Monthly Cost (with $ indicator).

assertions.title: Business name pre-filled
assertions.notes: Business Name field correctly defaults to 'I&M HVAC' on first visit (no localStorage data).

assertions.title: Monthly cost default

steps.action: Check Butter AI Monthly Cost field

assertions.notes: Butter AI Monthly Cost field correctly defaults to 300 ($300/mo) on first visit.

assertions.title: Settings persist across page reload
assertions.notes: Settings persist across page reload via localStorage. The SettingsForm component uses a 500ms debounce (SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS) and saves to localStorage keys: butter-businessName, butter-avgJobValue, butter-monthlyCost.

assertions.title: Average job value accepts numeric input

steps.action: Enter '5000' in Average Job Value field

assertions.notes: Average Job Value field accepts numeric input and has a $ indicator. The field uses inputMode='decimal' and the sanitizeNumericInput function from @/lib/settings to filter out non-numeric characters.

assertions.title: Settings save behavior
assertions.notes: Settings save automatically with visual confirmation. The SettingsForm shows 'Saving...' during the 500ms debounce period, then 'Saved' for 1500ms (SAVED_MESSAGE_DURATION_MS) after successful save. The saveStatus state transitions from 'idle' -> 'saving' -> 'saved' -> 'idle'.

assertions.title: Average job value default

steps.action: Check Average Job Value on first visit

assertions.notes: Average Job Value correctly defaults to 0 on first visit. The DEFAULT_SETTINGS constant in settings.ts sets averageJobValue to 0, and the formatNumberForInput function converts this to '0' string for the input field.

frictions.description: Browser session experienced intermittent crashes during screenshot capture and JavaScript evaluation, requiring session restarts
frictions.resolution: Closed and reopened browser session to continue testing

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed. All settings page functionality works as expected: three fields present, correct default values (I&M HVAC, 300, 0), auto-save with visual confirmation, input validation with $ indicators, and persistence via localStorage.
